parameters.content:
## Weekly Priorities Planner

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set PRIORITIES_EMAIL_TO
3. Fill in this week's context: OKRs, backlog items, commitments, meetings
4. LLM produces a ranked weekly priority plan with time allocation
5. Approval gate before the plan is sent to team

parameters.jsCode:
const { plan: p, ctx, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const top3 = p.top_3_priorities.map(t => `  [#${t.rank}] ${t.item}\n  Why this week: ${t.why_this_week}\n  OKR: ${t.linked_okr||'n/a'} | Est: ${t.estimated_hours}h | Day: ${t.suggested_day}`).join('\n\n');
const defer = (p.defer_list||[]).map(d => `  • ${d.item} — ${d.reason}`).join('\n');
const delegate = (p.delegate_list||[]).map(d => `  • ${d.item} → ${d.to}: ${d.reason}`).join('\n');
const alloc = p.focus_time_allocation;
const report = [
  `WEEKLY PLAN: ${ctx.week} | ${ctx.role}`,
  `Theme: "${p.weekly_theme}"`,
  `Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  ``,
  `TOP 3 PRIORITIES:`,
  top3,
  ``,
  `DEFER:`,
  defer || '  (none)',
  ``,
  `DELEGATE:`,
  delegate || '  (none)',
  ``,
  `TIME ALLOCATION: OKR work ${alloc.okr_work_hours}h | Meetings ${alloc.meetings_hours}h | Admin ${alloc.admin_hours}h`,
  ``,
  `RISKS: ${(p.risks_this_week||[]).join(' | ')}`,
  ``,
  `END-OF-WEEK SUCCESS CRITERIA:`,
  ...(p.end_of_week_success_criteria||[]).map(c => `  ✓ ${c}`),
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Weekly Plan — {{ $json.meta.week }}
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and share with team | Reject
